notes: GIF assets are converted to temporary MP4 with ffmpeg before upload.
This media judge is evidence-quality QA; it does not replace backend/browser production gates.

asset.title: App Manual Edit
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The GIF clearly demonstrates a manual edit workflow in the versioned spreadsheet, showing the transition from v1 to v2 with an updated room trace.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates clicking '+ add' to set a variance value, updating the cell and version.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the initial state, the click action, and the resulting state with updated trace.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed spreadsheet interface with clear visual hierarchy.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with NodeRoom's spreadsheet, versioning, and event trace concepts.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time state updates.

legibility.evidence: Spreadsheet values and trace logs are readable, though trace text is small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Relevant for financial and audit-trail use cases.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the manual edit action and its direct consequences.

observedEvidence: Version updates from v1 to v2
Room trace adds event: 'Homen set r_rev_variance = +20.5%'
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Manually editing a cell updates the spreadsheet version and appends a new event to the Room trace.

asset.title: L1 Read
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A clean, step-by-step visualization of an AI agent performing a read-only workflow on a financial table. It clearly demonstrates the non-destructive nature of the operation through structured trace steps.

featureClarity.evidence: The UI clearly highlights the rows being read and displays the agent's step-by-step actions at the bottom.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the progression from the initial goal through individual read steps to completion.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with clear typography and subtle row highlighting.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the spreadsheet and agent trace concept of NodeRoom.

evidenceQuality.evidence: High-fidelity trace replay that effectively demonstrates the agent's execution path.

legibility.evidence: All text, labels, and step counters are highly legible and easy to follow.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Demonstrates safe, read-only data access which is critical for financial auditing use cases.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the step-by-step logic of the agent without simulating fake complexity.

observedEvidence: Visual highlighting of table rows corresponding to agent read actions
Clear goal and final completion status message

defects.observed: The 'say' steps (5/7 and 6/7) do not display the actual text output generated by the agent.
defects.fix: Show a brief snippet of the reported value text in the status bar during the 'say' steps.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch a NodeRoom agent safely execute an L1 Read workflow, scanning financial variances step-by-step without altering any underlying data.

asset.title: L2 Edit
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The animation clearly demonstrates the step-by-step Compare-And-Set (CAS) protocol used by an AI agent to edit a spreadsheet cell safely. It is highly legible and structurally complete.

featureClarity.evidence: The step-by-step progression clearly explains the CAS lock, write, and release sequence.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the entire lifecycle from reading version v1 to committing version v2 and releasing the lock.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed UI with clear highlight states, though it functions more as an explanatory diagram than a live UI capture.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with NodeRoom's spreadsheet-based agent collaboration model.

evidenceQuality.evidence: High-quality vector-like animation, though it leans towards a conceptual walkthrough rather than raw terminal/app capture.

legibility.evidence: Text, status badges, and step indicators are highly readable with excellent contrast.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for technical audiences evaluating concurrency and multi-agent safety protocols.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the logical flow of CAS without pretending to be a live unedited screen recording.

observedEvidence: Step-by-step CAS lock and write sequence
Cell status transitions from V1 to LOCKED to COMMITTED V2
AI agent action log at the bottom

defects.observed: The step indicator shows 'say' with no accompanying text or dialogue content.
defects.fix: Provide actual dialogue text or consolidate the step to avoid empty placeholders.

defects.observed: Another 'say' step appears empty before the final 'done' state.
defects.fix: Add descriptive text or merge with the final completion step.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Visualizing NodeRoom's L2 Compare-And-Set (CAS) protocol: how agents safely lock, edit, and version spreadsheet cells to prevent overwrites.

asset.title: L3 No Clobber
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A clear, step-by-step visualization of concurrent edit handling (CAS) where an AI agent detects a conflict, re-reads the updated state, and successfully commits without clobbering.

featureClarity.evidence: The step-by-step progression clearly explains the CAS mechanism and conflict resolution.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the initial state, the conflict occurrence, the re-read, and the final committed state.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark mode interface with clear highlighting of the active row and status changes.

consistency.evidence: Matches the spreadsheet and versioning story of the platform.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Provides a realistic simulation of a concurrent write conflict and resolution.

legibility.evidence: Text and status labels are readable, though the bottom status bar is slightly small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for engineering and finance users concerned with data integrity.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the step-by-step logic of a CAS transaction.

observedEvidence: Agent action log at the bottom
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Demonstration of NodeRoom's concurrent edit protection (CAS) preventing an agent from overwriting a human's mid-write update.

asset.title: L6 Long Horizon
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A clear, step-by-step visualization of an AI agent resolving multi-cell conflicts in a financial model using CAS (Compare-And-Swap) and context compaction. The progression is highly legible and technically honest.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the entire lifecycle from initial state, through multiple read/write conflicts and compactions, to the final completed state.

legibility.evidence: Text, version tags, and bottom status logs are highly readable even at smaller preview sizes.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant to engineers building multi-agent systems and financial analysts concerned with data overwrites.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the step-by-step latency, retries, and conflict resolution steps without skipping complexity.

observedEvidence: Step-by-step execution trace from step 0/31 to 31/31
Visual indicators for CONFLICT, COMMITTED, and version numbers (V1, V2, V3)
Bottom status bar detailing agent actions (reads, writes, compaction)
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom's AI agent handle multi-cell financial updates under repeated human edit conflicts, utilizing context compaction and CAS to prevent data clobbering.

featureClarity.evidence: Clear step-by-step captions guide the viewer through the live sync and agent reconciliation process.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the entire sequence from message input to real-time cell updates across both client screens.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean side-by-side layout with helpful zoom-ins, though the transition is slightly abrupt.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom product concept of collaborative spreadsheets and agents.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing actual data changes, logs, and agent activity in real-time.

legibility.evidence: Initial split-screen text is small, but subsequent zoom-ins make the cell values readable.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for demonstrating multi-user financial collaboration and automated workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the step-by-step execution and propagation of agent actions.

defects.observed: Abrupt zoom transition to the close-up view of the spreadsheet.
defects.fix: Apply a smoother transition or fade when changing zoom levels.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom's live sync in action as a server-led agent reconciles financial variances across multiple clients simultaneously.

asset.title: Noderoom Live Collab V1
asset.purpose: Narrated explainer episode. Judge story clarity, visual design, proof quality, and whether it fits the README claim.

judge.summary: The video effectively demonstrates multiplayer collaboration between humans and an AI agent on a shared spreadsheet, highlighting conflict resolution and state locking.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows spreadsheet cell edits and agent collaboration clearly.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates cell selection, agent proposal, and human approval flow.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark mode UI with clear panels, though text is dense.

consistency.evidence: Matches the Noderoom concept of shared files, agents, and version history.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Real UI capture with actual code and state changes shown.

legibility.evidence: Text in spreadsheet cells and code editor is readable but small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for developers building collaborative AI applications.

productionHonesty.evidence: Explicitly shows conflict resolution code and state transitions.

defects.observed: Code snippet is shown briefly and has small font size.
defects.fix: Increase font size or extend duration of the code slide.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Noderoom Live Collab: Real-time multiplayer spreadsheet collaboration between humans and AI agents with built-in conflict resolution.

asset.title: Private Investment Room V1
asset.purpose: Narrated explainer episode. Judge story clarity, visual design, proof quality, and whether it fits the README claim.

judge.summary: A high-quality narrated explainer showing collaborative investment workflows, agent proposals, and version control in NodeRoom.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates clear features like data enrichment, agent proposals, and cell-level versioning.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the full flow from importing accounts to agent drafting and final human approval.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with well-structured panels, though some transitions are rapid.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of spreadsheets, walls, and private agents.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Shows authentic UI interactions, cursor movements, and real-time state updates.

legibility.evidence: Main text is highly legible, but some smaller spreadsheet cells require close attention.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly addresses high-trust financial workflows and human-in-the-loop AI collaboration.

productionHonesty.evidence: Explicitly highlights that agents propose rather than write directly, showing clear boundaries.

defects.observed: Rapid zoom transition into the spreadsheet panel can feel slightly abrupt.
defects.fix: Ease the zoom transition curve to make the camera movement smoother.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: See how NodeRoom enables high-trust investment preparation with auditable agent proposals and full version control.
